9:00AM DEPT 8, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT PLAINTIFF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFENDANTS FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF VS. BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNIGHT, MONICA KUDHAIR, HAIDER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 641 O'FARRELL ST. #207 S.F, CA. 94109 $1,770.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,770.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS PURSUANT TO A COST BILL.
